REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT HING WAH CONSTRUCTION, INC, TONY LEE DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. PLAINTIFFS FIRST AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION ARE OVERRULED BECAUSE PLAINTIFFS SUFFICIENTLY PLED A CAUSE OF ACTION THAT IS NOT TIME BARRED. PLAINTIFFS FOURTH AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE PLAINTIFFS BECAUSE THERE IS NO ALLEGED TIMEFRAME IN WHICH THE CAUSES OF ACTION ACCRUED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF RAPHAEL MERRIMAN, CAROL DONALDSON NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT SHALL BE FILED AND SERVED FORTHWITH. THE COURT MAKES NO DETERMINATIONS ARE TO THE ARGUMENTS REGARDING SHAM PLEADINGS AND STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. IF THESE ARGUMENTS ARE RAISED ON A DEMURRER OR A MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS, THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IN WRITING AND IN GOOD FAITH REGARDING THESE ISSUES. ORDER FOR THE SAME SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT HING WAH CONSTRUCTION, INC, TONY LEE DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Plaintiffs First and Third Causes of Action are overruled because Plaintiffs sufficiently pled a cause of action that is not time barred. Plaintiffs Fourth and Fifth Causes of Action are sustained with leave to amend because Plaintiffs because there is no alleged timeframe in which the causes of action accrued. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Off Calendar Sep-13-2019 Continued To Dec-04-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Miller, Esq., 650-323-2003, appearing for Raphael Merriman, Plaintiff and moving party.

Terrence Brasch, Esq., 510-596-0888, appearing for Hing Wah, for Defendant and opposing party.

Argued. The Court stated that there is no trial date set. Mr. Brasch reported that he contested to the tentative and requested that the Court rule on the objections. Mr. Miller argued that the objections were untimely.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RAPHAEL MERRIMAN, CAROL DONALDSON Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Second Amended Complaint shall be filed and served forthwith. The Court makes no determinations are to the arguments regarding sham pleadings and statute of limitations. If these arguments are raised on a demurrer or a motion for judgment on the pleadings, the parties are ordered to meet and confer in writing and in good faith regarding these issues. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
